##### PICK AND CHOOSE

## Why customization?

Standardized assessments don’t work for every role. With eSkill, you can create custom pre employment testing solutions to evaluate exactly what matters for your industry, team, and organizational goals — ensuring every hire is the right fit.

Assessment creation screen with subject selection, assessment name, length, skill level options, and save button.

## Custom pre-employment tests to fit your hiring needs

With eSkill’s custom test creation tools, you have full control over the structure, content, and focus of your assessment, ensuring every candidate evaluation is perfectly aligned with the demands of the role.

* #### Combine Questions From Pre-Built Tests
 
 Select questions from eSkill’s library of over 800 tests to build a comprehensive evaluation tailored to your industry or role.
 
* #### Create Role-Specific Tests From Scratch
 
 Craft tests based on your job requirements, ensuring you assess the skills that matter most.
 
* #### Upload Your Own Questions
 
 Add proprietary questions to reflect your specific workflows or company processes.
 
* #### Adjust Test Complexity
 
 Customize the length, difficulty, and focus of your assessments to match the job level and expectations.
 

##### QUESTION TYPES

## Dynamic question formats to test every skill.

Multiple choice questions only go so far. eSkill allows you to mix question types to create a customized talent assessment that mirrors the day-to-day challenges of the role. This approach ensures your candidates are tested on what matters most, giving you the confidence in their ability to succeed.

### Video

Evaluate candidates’ communication, critical thinking, and situational judgment with video-based questions.

### Simulations

Test how candidates perform in job-specific tasks with realistic, interactive simulations.

### Multiple Choice

Quickly and objectively evaluate candidates’ knowledge and skills with multiple-choice questions.

### Free Response

Gain deeper insights into a candidate’s intuition, problem-solving, and written communication skills with free-response questions.

User interface with a video player showing 2:00 duration and a red Record Video button below it.

Explore Video

Interactive quiz showing human organs to drag and match with their functions on a body diagram.

Explore Simulation

Multiple-choice question interface with options A to E; option D is selected, and navigation buttons are shown.

Explore Multiple Choice

Typing question form with text, description, time limit input, and buttons to suggest, cancel, delete, or save.

Explore Free Response

## Test job-ready skills with advanced simulations

Custom job simulations provide a hands-on way to evaluate whether candidates can handle the responsibilities of the job. If you have processes and procedures that are critical for your business operation, you can use online simulations tests to help you assess candidates’ ability to perform these operations. Job simulations give you measurable, data-driven results to identify the most qualified applicants quickly and accurately.

Spreadsheet with columns for Product ID, Category, and Price in an Excel window.

### MS Office Simulation

Measure applicants’ skills with Word®, Excel®, Outlook®, and PowerPoint® by using a simulation of the program that pops up in their browser. By testing these abilities inside the actual platform, you can accurately measure competencies in job-related situations.

Computer screen showing mail inbox, chat window with message from John Smith, and menu with mail, orders, chat.

### Multitasking Simulation

Set up a series of tasks and set a time limit to assess candidates’ ability to perform under pressure. They’ll simultaneously manage emails, reply to chat messages, handle orders, and respond to customer requests.

Interactive quiz showing human organs to drag and match with their functions on screen.

### Chat Simulation

Measure a candidate’s ability to communicate. They’ll manage multiple chats, answer emails, handle orders and respond to customer requests.

Learn More

##### MAKE IT YOURS

## Create a seamless candidate experience.

Turn pre-employment testing into a branding opportunity with eSkill's customized talent assessments. From the design of your assessment pages to the emails sent to candidates, you can create a hiring process that feels uniquely yours.

Get a Demo

### Add Your Logo

Display your company’s logo prominently throughout the candidate’s journey. Your logo will appear on the welcome page candidates see when they login to take an assessment, on your internal test center pages, on the results page they receive, and on the reports you generate.

### Consistent Brand Experience

Customize your test screens, headers, and footers to ensure a consistent candidate experience throughout the hiring process.

### Custom Fields

Ask candidates to provide additional information such as their location, and citizenship status when they login to complete talent assessments.

Graphic design elements including color palette, pen tool, eyedropper, vector points, and typography symbols.

### Personalized Email Messages

Personalize the text of your pre employment testing invitations and confirmation e-mails, and save them as templates to send to future candidates.

### White Label

Provides a branded pre-hire testing experience with your company color theme, and only your name and logo appear with no mention of eSkill.

### Your Brand Name Only

Set up your testing center page so official notices and URLs, copyright credentials, privacy policy, terms of use, and feedback include your company name only.

"We utilize eSkill to determine a candidate's capability that may not have the direct experience listed on their resume. This tool is very useful for Hiring Managers who may need some convincing to pull the trigger. The software is user-friendly, and customer service is very responsive."

The data extraction process is pretty user-friendly as is using the option to forward test results."

As our company really started to grow in size, we started to notice the pains from hiring managers about the quality of candidates and recent hires. There was pressure to fill open roles as quickly as possible. Once we started to use eSkill, we saw improved confidence when hiring and more qualified employees. Our managers were on board with using eSkill, mainly because we were able to work together to create specific assessments. We have not looked back since!

eSkill has enhanced our pre-employment skills testing. With the large database of questions readily available, it is easy to create or alter a test to fit a specific position or department. The website is user friendly for both the applicant and the administrator. The people at eSkill have been extremely helpful and friendly on any question that has arisen.

Shonna Wessels

FedEx

We chose eSkill because it meets and exceeds our needs. eSkill is unmatched in its ability to manage franchise locations, customize and configure tests, and customer service. The platform makes test deployment fast and easy, while our dedicated account manager has been very proactive in making sure we get the most out of eSkill. We would recommend eSkill to anyone who is looking to identify skilled candidates.

AtWork

“eSkill helped us complete the circle in our hiring and screening process by providing a simple-to-use testing platform. This platform set the perfect stage to verify skills and abilities for applicants ranging from entry level customer service to senior level software engineers. Our hiring managers have been very pleased with the variety of standard tests available, along with our ability to create and post our own tests. This system has literally saved us hundreds of working hours.”

1-800 Contacts

“The testing went great! We loved the ability to create our own test from a bank of existing questions. It was a key part of our search process and we found an excellent candidate. As I said, we don’t do searches for technical positions very often, but when we do, eSkill testing will always be a part of it.”

University of Maryland

"eSkill assessments are the only way we can validate the candidates’ skill level. eSkill has been a good tool for us overall and as far as I know is very user friendly. We use it as a selling point to clients that we thoroughly vet our candidates before they are sent out for either interviews or placements."

Judy Contreras
